scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.package:prepare: npm run build && node scripts/build-server-pkg.mjs && node scripts/prepare-win-package.mjs
scripts.package:win64: npm run package:prepare && pkg -c pkg.config.json build/pkg/index.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/win64/eri-db-search.exe --public-packages "*"
